zh.lifeSummary: 當Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine於1263年出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒圖爾時，他的父親Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen25歲，母親Duchess Margaret de Champagne23歲。他和Isabelle de Rumigny至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1312年5月13日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易波奧普雷奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine于1263年出生在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒圖爾时，他的父亲Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen25岁，母亲Duchess Margaret de Champagne23岁。他和Isabelle de Rumigny至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1312年5月13日在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易波奧普雷奧。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Theobald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from þeud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The first element was altered under the influence of Greek theos ‘god’. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine was born in 1263, in Toul, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, his father, Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen, was 25 and his mother, Duchess Margaret de Champagne, was 23. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Isabelle de Rumigny. He died on 13 May 1312, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Beaupréau, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine est né en 1263, à Toul, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Duchess Margaret de Champagne, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Isabelle de Rumigny. Il est décédé le 13 mai 1312, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Beaupréau, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.Beaupréau, Département de Maine-et-Loire: Beaupréau, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine 1263 in Toul, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen 25 und seine Mutter Duchess Margaret de Champagne 23. Er hatte mit Isabelle de Rumigny mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Mai 1312 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Beaupréau, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine è nato il nel 1263 nel Toul, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Duchess Margaret de Champagne, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Isabelle de Rumigny. Morì il 13 maggio 1312, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Beaupréau, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraineが1263年にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルトウルで生まれた時，父Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringenは25歳，母Duchess Margaret de Champagneは23歳であった。彼はIsabelle de Rumignyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1312年5月13日に故郷で49歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアービーウプルeアウにて埋葬された。

ko.Beaupréau, Département de Maine-et-Loire: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 보플e오
ko.lifeSummary: Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine(이)가 1263년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 토우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Duchess Margaret de Champagne(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Isabelle de Rumigny(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1312년 5월 13일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 보플e오에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine nasceu em 1263, em Toul, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Duchess Margaret de Champagne, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Isabelle de Rumigny. Ele faleceu em 13 de maio de 1312, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Beaupréau, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.Beaupréau, Département de Maine-et-Loire: бопрeау, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine родился в 1263 г. в местности тоул, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Duchess Margaret de Champagne, 23. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Isabelle de Rumigny. Он умер 13 мая 1312 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности бопрeау, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.
